footer_brand_tagline: Earn rewards by participating in surveys and research studies
home_meta_title: EarnMaze - Earn Rewards for Your Opinions
home_meta_description: Join EarnMaze to earn rewards by participating in surveys. Complete surveys, earn points, and redeem exciting rewards.
home_hero_badge: Earn rewards in your spare time
home_hero_subtitle: Complete quick surveys, earn points instantly, and redeem them for gift cards from top brands. It takes just minutes to start.
home_step_1_desc: Sign up in 30 seconds. No credit card needed, ever.
home_step_2_desc: Answer questions matched to your profile. Each takes 5-15 min.
home_step_3_desc: Redeem points for gift cards from top brands. Fast and easy.
home_feature_payouts_desc: Earn points for every completed survey, with rates that reflect your time.
home_feature_fast_desc: Redeem points for gift cards as soon as you hit the threshold. Most are processed within a few business days.
home_feature_smart_desc: Our algorithm finds surveys you'll actually qualify for.
home_feature_quick_desc: Most surveys take 5-10 minutes. Earn during your lunch break.
home_cta_subtitle: Turn spare minutes into real rewards. Free to join, no subscription.
auth_login_meta_description: Sign in to your EarnMaze account to access your dashboard and start earning rewards.
auth_login_subheading: Sign in to your EarnMaze account
auth_security_check_msg: Please complete the security check below.
auth_verification_timeout: Verification timed out. Please refresh and try again.
auth_register_meta_description: Create your EarnMaze account and start earning rewards by participating in surveys.
auth_register_subheading: Join EarnMaze and start earning rewards
auth_consent_age: I confirm I am at least 18 years old.
auth_consent_marketing: Send me product updates and offers from EarnMaze. You can opt out any time.
auth_forgot_subheading: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
auth_generic_error: An error occurred. Please try again.
auth_forgot_sent_body: If an account with this email exists, you will receive a password reset link shortly.
auth_forgot_didnt_receive: Didn't receive the email? Check your spam folder or try again.
auth_security_link_expiry_notice: For your security, password reset links expire after 1 hour.
auth_reset_subheading: Create a new secure password for your account.
auth_reset_password_min: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth_reset_consent_required: Please confirm age and accept the Terms and Privacy Policy
auth_reset_invalid_link_body: The reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
auth_reset_success_body: Your password has been reset. Redirecting to login...
about_meta_description: Learn about EarnMaze - Professional survey platform for earning rewards through research participation.
about_subheading: Your gateway to earning rewards through meaningful research participation
about_mission_para1: EarnMaze Panel is dedicated to making market research more efficient, accurate, and rewarding for everyone involved. We bridge the gap between researchers seeking quality data and individuals who want to share their opinions while earning meaningful rewards.
about_mission_para2: Our platform leverages advanced technology to ensure high-quality data collection while providing a seamless experience for both researchers and respondents.
about_quality_desc: Every response matters. Our quality assurance systems ensure reliable data.
about_pillar_secure_desc: Your data is protected with enterprise-grade security and industry-standard privacy practices.
about_pillar_fast_desc: Streamlined processes that save time for researchers and respondents alike.
about_pillar_user_desc: Designed with the user experience as our top priority for maximum engagement.
about_cta_subtitle: Join thousands of users who trust EarnMaze for their research needs
contact_meta_description: Get in touch with EarnMaze. Reach our support, privacy, or business teams directly via email.
contact_subheading: Pick the right team below — we usually reply within one business day.
contact_support_desc: Account issues, surveys, payouts, or anything else as a panelist.
contact_privacy_desc: Data access, deletion, or any other privacy-related question.
contact_business_desc: Run surveys, partnerships, or media inquiries.
contact_response_time: Most messages get a response within one business day. Please include relevant details (account email, survey name, dates) to help us help you faster.
sb_logout_body: You'll need to log in again to access your account.
dash_no_surveys: We'll let you know when new surveys drop
dash_info_how: Complete surveys to earn points. Redeem your points for gift cards from top brands. Check available surveys below!
dash_info_threshold: You're earning great! Keep going — most gift cards start at 500 points.
dash_welcome_desc: Complete your first survey to start earning points. It only takes a few minutes.
dash_referral_desc: Share your link and earn when they sign up
dash_activity_empty_desc: Complete a survey to get started
hdr_referrals_desc: Invite friends and earn bonus points
hist_info: View your complete activity log. Filter by surveys, points, or rewards. Green amounts are earned, red are spent or deducted.
hist_empty_all: Start completing surveys to build your history.
pts_meta_description: Track your points balance and transaction history.
pts_info: Points are earned by completing surveys. Available = your spendable balance. Lifetime = total ever earned. Redeemed = points exchanged for gift cards.
ref_info: Share your referral link with friends. When they sign up and complete their first survey, you both earn bonus points!
ref_invite_desc: Share your link and earn bonus points
ref_step1_desc: Send your referral link to friends
ref_step2_desc: They create an account and complete a survey
ref_step3_desc: You both receive bonus points automatically
ref_empty_desc: Share your link to start earning bonus points
svy_meta_description: Browse available surveys and view your survey completion history.
svy_info: Click 'Start' on any survey to begin earning. You'll be redirected to the survey — once done, points are credited automatically. Partial credit may apply for terminated or quota-full surveys.
svy_empty_desc: Check back later for new earning opportunities.
svy_default_desc: Complete this survey to earn points.
svy_history_empty_desc: Complete your first survey to build your history.
svy_toast_screened_out: You were screened out of this survey.
prof_info: Complete your profile to get matched with more relevant surveys. The more we know about you, the better surveys we can offer — and more points you'll earn.
prof_demographics_desc: Helps match you with relevant surveys
prof_notif_desc: How you'd like to be notified
prof_marketing_desc: Promotional offers and product updates (separate from transactional emails)
prof_marketing_off: You will not receive promotional emails
prof_marketing_disclaimer: Transactional emails (verification codes, password resets, redemption confirmations) are sent regardless of this setting — they're required for the service to function.
rwd_info: Click 'Redeem' on any reward to submit a redemption request. Our team reviews requests and processes them within 24-48 hours. Track your request status in 'My Redemptions'.
rwd_no_rewards_desc: Check back later for new reward opportunities.
rwd_tip_1: Complete surveys regularly to maximize earnings
rwd_tip_2: Look for high-value surveys with bonus points
rwd_tip_3: Provide quality responses to unlock more opportunities
rwd_confirm_otp_note: A verification code will be sent to your registered email. Your gift card will also be delivered to the same email.
rwd_otp_subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your email
rwd_otp_expires: Code expires in 5 minutes. Your gift card will be sent to the same email.
rwd_success_track_note: You can track your redemption status above. We'll process it shortly.
rwd_confirm_cancel_msg: Cancel this redemption? Your points will be refunded.
sup_new_ticket_desc: We'll get back to you as soon as possible
sup_form_required: Please fill in both subject and message.
sup_form_failed_retry: Failed to submit ticket. Please try again.
sup_help_subtitle: Find answers or create a ticket
sup_no_faqs_desc: Check back later or create a support ticket.
sup_no_tickets_desc: Didn't find your answer in the FAQ?
sup_still_need_help: Still need help? Create a new ticket →
help_meta_description: Get help with your EarnMaze account, payouts, surveys, and privacy. Contact our support team or browse common questions.
help_subheading: Browse common questions below, or reach out directly — we usually reply within one business day.
help_tickets_desc: Already have an account? Open a ticket from your dashboard for the fastest response.
help_not_found: Did not find what you were looking for?
